headline: Elizabeth Warren Grills Fed Chair Kevin Warsh Over Stanley Druckenmiller Ties: 'Who Gave You $100 Million?'
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh was subjected to intense questioning by Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) regarding potential ethics violations. On Wednesday, his second day of monetary policy testimony on Capitol Hill, Warsh was grilled by Warren about a $100 million...

headline: Bank of America sends strong verdict on Microsoft stock
summary: Microsoft has been one of the worst-performing large-cap tech stocks of 2026, down about 20% year to date, even as the company keeps expanding its AI business and growing Azure at a pace most cloud companies would envy. headline: Wall Street Raises Expectations for Goldman, Other Banks After Strong Earnings
summary: Earnings results showed generally solid credit health among borrowers, strong dealmaking activity, and blowout trading numbers.

headline: BofA sees lost year taking shape for gold
summary: Gold’s 2026 story was mostly supposed to be how high the safe-haven trade could potentially run. For context, the shiny yellow metal soared roughly 63% in 2025, according to LBMA benchmark data, the strongest annual gain in more than four decades. Lately, though, the bull case has been ...

headline: This Week's Market Wrap: AI Shakeup, Earnings, And Renewed Oil Shock
summary: Semiconductor stocks suffered another violent reversal despite strong results from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing and continued evidence of robust demand for computing infrastructure.
